articles.author: Sherry Qin
articles.title: Oil Climbs, Asian Equities Fall as U.S.-Iran Peace Talks Collapse - WSJ
articles.description: Oil surges back above $100 barrel after dipping following a cease-fire announcement last week
articles.content: Oil rose back above $100 a barrel and Asian equities fell, as the collapse of the U.S.-Iran peace talks poured cold water on hopes of an end to the fighting that has roiled markets, threatening to sl… [+414 chars]
